THIS CONTINUANCE IS PURSUANT TO CALIFORNIA GOVERNMENT CODE 68115 AND THE EMERGENCY ORDER OF THE CHIEF JUSTICE OF THE CALIFORNIA SUPREME COURT DATED MARCH 16, 2020. ALL PARTIES ARE TO APPEAR BY TELEPHONE AS AUTHORIZED BY THE CHIEF JUSTICE OF CALIFORNIA (STATEWIDE EMERGENCY ORDER OF 3/30/20.) COURT RESERVES JURISDICTION OVER ALL ISSUES PENDING FURTHER ORDER OF THE COURT. SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS IN RE: TELEPHONIC APPEARANCE.
